_README: BMDW brand assets for the customer-facing PDF and email. Fill in the real values when Michael provides them.
quote_terms: Quote valid for 30 days. Final invoiced amount may vary based on site conditions discovered during work.

_business_rules.tax: 12% flat (GST + PST), applied at the end of the quote.
_business_rules.rental_insurance: 16% surcharge on equipment subtotal per quote. Equipment items don't carry it individually.
